styleSourcePR.usage: authoritative style, reference, approval, and migration source

readOnlyRuntimeBaselines.usage: Arena Ruins warm-stone readability context only

sourceBoundary.rule: Do not merge, rebase, or blind-cherry-pick PR #55 or #56 into this Coco production-source line. Consume approved assets path-limited in a later CC integration task.

styleInputs.archerReferenceResolution: style_anchor_archer intentionally shares the archived gameplay context binary; the shop-card and on-board green Archer regions plus the locked textual traits are the evidence source.

usage: future board, bench, and shop-card review composites
forbiddenUsage: replacement for any existing Archer asset

provenance.method: OpenAI image generation from the archived PR #58 gameplay context reference and the PR #58 Archer style lock; flat chroma background was removed to real alpha and the review candidate was normalized to the existing 2:3 working-canvas recommendation.
promptIntent: green hood and green hair with pointed elf-like ears
no crop, action pose, UI, card, environment, floor, text, or baked shadow
processing: generated at 1024x1536 on a solid magenta chroma field
converted to RGBA with a dominance-aware soft matte and color despill
removed alpha noise at or below 3 percent
visually checked over a warm-stone surrogate background
provenance.approvalBoundary: Generation and technical inspection do not constitute user approval of this exact file.

face: no material face drift across future derivatives or motion
hair: readable swept front and side silhouette
shape and parting remain stable across frames
hood: gold trim supports the head silhouette
does not obscure eyes or primary facial read
outfit: detail simplified below silhouette, face, and weapon priority

required: hands remain readable around the bow grip

priority: large hood, hair, and pointed-ear head shape
silhouetteLock.recognitionTarget: female Ranger identity should read within approximately one second at board, bench, shop-card, and portrait-like scales

weaponLock.scale: slightly oversized for immediate class readability
weaponLock.continuity: bow curvature, gold blade-like tips, green inset, grip, and string relationship remain stable across future motion
mustNot: change handedness except through documented runtimeFlipX
change identity between master, card, and animation derivatives

paletteLock.arenaRuinsReadability: Use value separation, gold rim accents, skin/eye focal contrast, and a crisp outer silhouette so green does not collapse into foliage accents or warm stone.

neutralMasterSpecification.role: identity source for later approved Idle, Move, Attack, shop-card, bench, board-unit, and portrait/icon derivatives

canvasDecision.rationale: The existing Archer motion contract uses a 2:3 frame shape and recommends a 640x960 working canvas with a 1024 maximum source dimension before smaller runtime exports. This minimizes migration cost while retaining enough detail for the new style.
canvasDecision.runtimeExportDecision: deferred until exact-file approval and the future motion/integration task

composition: full body from hood tip and bow tip through both feet
centered with transparent margin on every side
not attack, walk, run, or exaggerated idle extreme
neutralMasterSpecification.anchorPolicy: Preserve the existing technical baseline provisionally. Revalidate against approved feet placement before any frames are generated; record a migration requirement rather than changing runtime here.

generationRequirements.style: Cute stylized fantasy chibi, gameplay-first readability
forbidden: baked background, floor, card, UI, text, or environmental shadow

checks: identity and expression match the Archer lock
full body and bow are uncropped
real alpha and margins are clean
face, hood, ears, hair, outfit, and bow are internally consistent
silhouette separates from Arena Ruins warm stone
no board geometry or camera change is required
hood and hair do not merge into one blob
feet and bow stay within the visual slot
face and eyes carry the focal read
bow and green/gold class cues remain visible
crop derivative does not alter master identity
card frame and rarity treatment remain separate UI ownership

productionSequence: user approves the exact Neutral Master candidate
CC performs a separate path-limited runtime integration
protectedAreas: economy, stage logic, and main loop
existing motion runtime and motion frames
